data.name: errors.not-found
data.comment: Translator: Title of HTTP 404 page; appears as page heading in tenant browser-shell.

data.name: errors.not-found.detail
data.comment: Translator: Body text under the 404 title; full sentence.

data.name: errors.unauthorized
data.comment: Translator: Imperative title — sign in to continue. Pairs with sign-in button.

data.name: errors.unauthorized.detail
data.value: 您的会话已过期或您尚未登录。
data.comment: Translator: Body text on HTTP 401; mentions both expired and never-signed-in states.

data.name: errors.forbidden
data.comment: Translator: Title for HTTP 403; user is signed in but lacks permission.

data.name: errors.forbidden.detail
data.value: 您没有执行此操作的权限。
data.comment: Translator: Body text on HTTP 403; full sentence.

data.name: errors.conflict
data.comment: Translator: Title for HTTP 409; CRDT merge conflict requiring user attention.

data.name: errors.conflict.detail
data.value: 请求与资源的当前状态冲突。请检查后重试。
data.comment: Translator: Body text on HTTP 409; tells user the request lost a race and to retry.

data.name: validation.required
data.comment: Translator: Inline form-validation; required field is empty.

data.name: validation.min-length
data.value: 必须至少包含 {min} 个字符。
data.comment: Translator: Min-length violation; {min} is integer character count.

data.name: validation.max-length
data.comment: Translator: Max-length violation; {max} is integer character count.

data.name: validation.email-format
data.value: 请输入有效的电子邮件地址。
data.comment: Translator: Email parse failed; "电子邮件" preferred over loanword in formal zh-CN.

data.name: validation.url-format
data.comment: Translator: URL parse failed; "URL" stays Latin per ADR 0034.

data.name: validation.numeric-only
data.comment: Translator: Numeric-only field received non-digit characters.

data.name: validation.date-format
data.comment: Translator: Date parse failed; locale uses YYYY-MM-DD by convention.

data.name: validation.future-date-only
data.value: 日期必须是将来的日期。
data.comment: Translator: Future-date-only field; strictly after today.

data.name: validation.past-date-only
data.value: 日期必须是过去的日期。
data.comment: Translator: Past-date-only field; strictly before today.

data.name: actions.save
data.comment: Translator: Button label — commit draft.

data.name: actions.cancel
data.comment: Translator: Button label — discard draft.

data.name: actions.retry
data.comment: Translator: Button label — reattempt failed sync.

data.name: actions.delete
data.comment: Translator: Button label — destructive removal.

data.name: actions.confirm
data.comment: Translator: Button label — proceed with displayed action.

data.name: actions.edit
data.comment: Translator: Button label — switch to edit-mode.

data.name: actions.search
data.comment: Translator: Button label or placeholder — execute query.

data.name: status.loading
data.comment: Translator: Status — initial fetch in progress; "中" suffix marks ongoing.

data.name: status.saving
data.comment: Translator: Status — write to ledger in progress.

data.name: status.processing
data.comment: Translator: Status — generic in-flight operation.

data.name: status.completed
data.comment: Translator: Status — terminal success state; "已" prefix marks completed aspect.

data.name: status.failed
data.comment: Translator: Status — terminal failure state.

data.name: status.idle
data.comment: Translator: Status — no operation in flight; quiescent state.
